GeneralDescription.SourceString: A worthy hunter whose enchanted arrows never miss their mark.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: A worthy hunter whose enchanted arrows never miss their mark.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Khari has rarely encountered her equal in hunting... so the arrival of Artemis, the Goddess of the Eternal Hunt, a pretty big deal for her! Is the formidable Khari too proud to ask for an autograph?
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Khari has rarely encountered her equal in hunting... so the arrival of Artemis, the Goddess of the Eternal Hunt, a pretty big deal for her! Is the formidable Khari too proud to ask for an autograph?
